validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.command: pnpm run typecheck (turbo typecheck + pnpm lint:sonar:guard)

gate_results.log_path: 4 codex rounds: round 1 = 3 real findings (onSuccess/onError callback capture not exercised); round 2 = PASS; round 3 = 3 real findings (dialog-open-not-tested MEDIUM, missing-toast-assertion LOW x2); round 4 = PASS (0 findings). All findings were real, fixed in commits 91194a805 and a5f8bd26c.
pre-ship diff-coverage PASS at SHA 6a46708f5 — changed lines in page.test.tsx fully covered by the test suite itself
PASS: 9, WARN: 1 (pre-existing _summary.json not found for Sprint 0), FAIL: 0 at SHA 6a46708f5

kpi_results.actual: 45 tests (20 existing + 25 new across 5 new describe blocks)
45 tests pass, activityFeed invalidators wired and exercised via capturedCallbacks pattern
45/45 tests green, full web suite 11201/11201 pass

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-01 Tab Switching: 7 tab labels render + tab switching + Overview default
definition_of_done_items.evidence: describe('LeadDetailPage - Tab Navigation') tests: 7 tab labels exist, clicking each switches content, Overview is default

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-02 Notes Tab + addNote mutation: textarea, mutate call, isPending disables button, onSuccess/onError callbacks
definition_of_done_items.evidence: describe('LeadDetailPage - Notes Tab + addNote mutation'): textarea, Add Note mutate call, isPending state, onSuccess/onError via capturedCallbacks pattern

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-03 logActivity mutation: QuickLogComposer triggers mutate, isPending disables submit
definition_of_done_items.evidence: describe('LeadDetailPage - logActivity mutation'): mutate call verified, isPending state tested

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-04 Error 404: 'Lead Not Found' heading, Back to Leads link, no retry button
definition_of_done_items.evidence: describe('LeadDetailPage - Error States'): NOT_FOUND renders 'Lead Not Found', Back to Leads present, no Retry button

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-05 Error 500: 'Something Went Wrong' heading + retry button
definition_of_done_items.evidence: INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR renders 'Something Went Wrong', Retry button present

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-06 Loading State: skeleton renders, no error text
definition_of_done_items.evidence: describe('LeadDetailPage - Loading State'): isLoading=true shows skeleton, no error text

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-07 Activity Feed Toggle: 6+ activities show Load more, 4 activities no Load more
definition_of_done_items.evidence: describe('LeadDetailPage - Activity Feed Toggle'): 6-activity Load more visible, 4-activity no Load more

definition_of_done_items.criterion: AC-08 Activity Tab renders ActivityFeed stub
definition_of_done_items.evidence: Switching to Activity tab renders mocked ActivityFeed component
Existing 19 tests preserved unmodified; all 45 tests pass (11201 web suite)

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Pre-ship all gates PASS at final SHA 6a46708f5
definition_of_done_items.evidence: node scripts/pre-ship.mjs: all required steps PASS at 6a46708f5 (pending PR CI confirmation)

notes: IFC-247 Lead Detail Page Tests — 45 tests implemented (20 existing + 25 new). Used capturedCallbacks pattern to exercise useMutation onSuccess/onError handlers. Codex converged to PASS in 4 rounds fixing: (1) callback capture pattern, (2) Dialog mock open prop guard, (3) toast assertions in onError tests. All pre-ship gates passed at final SHA 6a46708f5. PR pending CI confirmation.
